executives.name: Vincent Clerc
executives.background: Vincent Clerc has been with A.P. Moller - Maersk since 1997. He has held various leadership positions in North America and Copenhagen. Before becoming CEO, he was the CEO of Ocean & Logistics.

executives.name: Patrick Jany
executives.background: Patrick Jany joined Maersk in 2020 from Clariant AG, where he was the CFO. He has extensive experience in finance and executive management from various roles at Sandoz and Clariant.

executives.name: Aymeric Chandavoine
executives.background: Aymeric Chandavoine joined Maersk in 2011. He has held several leadership roles, including Head of Logistics & Services and Regional Managing Director for Greater China.

executives.name: Caroline Pontoppidan
executives.background: Caroline Pontoppidan joined Maersk in 2013. She previously served as the General Counsel for Maersk Line and has a background in law from Kromann Reumert.

executives.name: Henriette Hallberg Thygesen
executives.background: Henriette Hallberg Thygesen has been with Maersk since 1994. She has held various senior positions, including CEO of Svitzer and CEO of Fleet & Strategic Brands.

executives.name: Navneet Kapoor
executives.background: Navneet Kapoor joined Maersk in 2017. He previously held leadership roles at Target Corporation and GE. He is responsible for the company's technology and digital transformation.

executives.name: Rabab Boulos
executives.background: Rabab Boulos joined Maersk in 1996. She has held various operational and commercial leadership roles across the globe, including Head of Ocean Operations.

executives.name: Rotem Hershko
executives.background: Rotem Hershko joined Maersk in 2020. He has a background in e-commerce and logistics, having previously worked at Amazon and eBay.

executives.name: Johan Sigsgaard
executives.background: Johan Sigsgaard joined Maersk in 2002. He has held various leadership roles in trade management and network planning.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Mærsk Uggla
board_of_directors.background: Robert Mærsk Uggla is the CEO of A.P. Moller Holding. He has held various leadership positions within the A.P. Moller Group, including CEO of Svitzer.

board_of_directors.name: Marc Engel
board_of_directors.background: Marc Engel was previously the Chief Supply Chain Officer at Unilever. He has extensive experience in global supply chain management and sustainability.

board_of_directors.name: Bernard Bot
board_of_directors.background: Bernard Bot is the CFO of Logitech. He has previously served as CFO of Travelport and Aer Lingus, and held senior roles at TNT Express.

board_of_directors.name: Diane de Saint Victor
board_of_directors.background: Diane de Saint Victor was the General Counsel and Company Secretary of ABB. She has extensive experience in legal, compliance, and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Jørgen Madsen Lindemann
board_of_directors.background: Jørgen Madsen Lindemann is the CEO of SAS. He was previously the President and CEO of Modern Times Group (MTG).

board_of_directors.name: Kasper Rørsted
board_of_directors.background: Kasper Rørsted was the CEO of Adidas and previously the CEO of Henkel. He has extensive experience in global consumer goods and digital transformation.

board_of_directors.name: Marika Fredriksson
board_of_directors.background: Marika Fredriksson was the CFO of Vestas Wind Systems. She has a strong background in finance and industrial management.

board_of_directors.name: Julija Voitiekute
board_of_directors.background: Julija Voitiekute is an employee-elected member of the board. She works as a Senior Decarbonisation Integration Manager at Maersk.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Lindegaard Madsen
board_of_directors.background: Thomas Lindegaard Madsen is an employee-elected member of the board. He is a Captain at Maersk.
